data.title: Grant Cardone buys 200 Bitcoin, totaling 500 BTC, in a market dip to store his money securely.
data.description: Cardone Capital, headed by renowned U.S. real estate figure Grant Cardone, recently announced the acquisition of 200 Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) this week. This purchase comes amidst a significant downturn in the crypto market, marking a strategic move by Cardone to expand its holdings. The latest addition of 200 BTC adds to the company's existing 300 BTC, bringing their total Bitcoin ownership to 500. Cardone expressed unwavering confidence in Bitcoin's long-term prospects despite market fluctuations, highlighting his belief in Bitcoin as a more secure asset compared to traditional saving methods. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Global market for Targeted Alpha Therapies valued at $199.6M in 2024, set to grow at 44% CAGR, reaching $1.1B by 2030.
data.description: A study by BCC Research reveals that the global market for Targeted Alpha Therapies (TAT) in cancer treatment was worth $199.6 million in 2024. It is projected to grow at a CAGR of 44% from 2025 to 2030, reaching $1.1 billion. The report discusses market trends, revenue data, cancer type segmentation, challenges, emerging technologies, and ESG initiatives. It also outlines the competitive landscape, including pipeline analysis and company profiles. Factors driving market growth include the rise in cancer cases, demand for precision medicines, unmet treatment needs, strategic initiatives, and new targets for TAT. The report serves as a valuable resource for understanding the current dynamics and outlook of the TAT market.
MGE Energy announces routine dividend payout to shareholders.

data.title: Atlas Energy Solutions Inc. will release Q3 2025 earnings on Nov. 3 after market close, with a conference call on Nov. 4 at 8am CT.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Atlas Energy Solutions Inc. (NYSE: AESI) shared plans to release its Q3 2025 earnings report after the market closes on Monday, November 3, 2025. A conference call is scheduled for Tuesday, November 4, 2025, at 8:00am Central Time (9:00am Eastern Time) to discuss financial and operational results. A live webcast can be accessed at https://ir.atlas.energy/. Participants are encouraged to join the webcast at least 10 minutes prior to the starting time.

data.title: Gold advocate Peter Schiff warns of impending crypto market crash as Bitcoin hits $106,000, losing 34% of value compared to gold.
data.description: Renowned gold advocate, Peter Schiff, has expressed concerns about Bitcoin's downward trend, forecasting a potential collapse in the broader crypto market. He observed Bitcoin dropping to $106,000 today and highlighted its 34% loss in value compared to gold since its peak in August. Schiff emphasized Bitcoin's significant underperformance against the traditional safe-haven metal. This suggests a possible continuation of the downtrend in the near future. The complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Roseman University of Health Sciences opens Thorne Clinic for Integrative Oral Health and Primary Care in Henderson, Nevada.
data.description: In Henderson, Nevada, Roseman University of Health Sciences and PDS Health® jointly unveiled the new Thorne Clinic for Integrative Oral Health and Primary Care on the university’s campus. The dedication ceremony and ribbon-cutting event saw the participation of elected officials, business figures, and Henderson Chamber of Commerce representatives to commemorate the launch of the dental teaching clinic. Situated at 4 Sunset Way, Building A, the state-of-the-art clinic spans 12,000 square feet.
